prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: A stunningly handsome young man with extremely refined and delicate facial features, standing gracefully in full body view against a pure white background. He has flowing silver-white long hair that catches ethereal light, with piercing pale blue eyes that reflect both gentleness and mystery. His skin is as smooth and luminous as moonlight, with flawless complexion. He wears an elegant white flowing robe that billows gently around his slender, graceful form. His bare feet touch the ground softly, emphasizing his ethereal nature. A dreamy, soft luminous aura surrounds his entire figure, creating gentle light effects. His expression is serene and peaceful, with clear, crystalline eyes that seem to hold infinite tenderness. His overall appearance embodies an otherworldly, angelic beauty with delicate bone structure and aristocratic features. The character stands centered in the frame, painted in impressionist oil painting style with rich light and shadow variations, visible brushstrokes, and atmospheric depth. Handsome, attractive, beautiful, delicate features, clear skin, ethereal atmosphere, dreamlike quality, full-body character design, no text, no symbols, no words., very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: oil_painting
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
